# Fictional Vendor Security Notes

Vendor: ExampleFlow
Use case: internal workflow routing for support teams.
Data: support ticket metadata and user email addresses.

SOC 2 Type II report is available under NDA.
Encryption: TLS in transit and AES-256 at rest are stated.
SSO: SAML SSO is available on enterprise plan.
Audit logs: admin activity logs are available for 90 days.
Data retention: customer data deletion is pending documentation.

DPA terms are not included in this packet. Subprocessor list is not included. Breach notification timing is TBD.
